title: myriactis humilis var. bipinnatisecta
intro: Myriactis humilis var. bipinnatisecta, also known as the cutleaf myriactis, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Myriactis humilis var. bipinnatisecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing, making it beneficial for health issues such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes. It can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and is often used topically in the form of ointments, salves, or creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
